create_ss_crate.jei.info.end_portal_plac: §0This Crate allows you to place in the end portal frame automatically. Simply break the crate to activate it. The portal will be placed around the crate in a 5x5 area. If there are blocks in the way, the portal will not be placed.
create_ss_crate.jei.info.end_portal_brea: §0This Crate allows you to break end portal frames as well as the end portal blocks itself. Simply break the crate to activate it. The crate will then break all End Portal Frames and End Portal Blocks in a 5x5x5 area around itself. Any other blocks will remain unaffected.
